title.en: When the time comes, he won't be able to keep t...

content.en:
From the point of view of the Immortal Separation Mist Ancestor, the fall of the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor must have something to do with Ye Tian, the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, perhaps it was not Ye Tian who made the shot, but other invincible people.

But no matter what the situation is, the Blood Mist Alliance can be regarded as offending the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws.

In case, the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws came to invade the Blood Mist Alliance with a fifth-rank invincible, he might find out here.

Basically, if you don't investigate this exotic world carefully, you won't find the secrets here, but once you invade, you will definitely find the secrets here.

When the time comes, he won't be able to keep this place at all.

"You shouldn't provoke the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Misty Ancestor regretted.

I thought it would be a very simple matter, the three invincibles could easily kill an ordinary sixth-rank invincible, but I didn't expect it to fail.

After all, he originally thought that if he didn't make a move, it would arouse suspicion from the outside world, and maybe someone with a heart would come to investigate, so it would be better to make a move.

But now this situation is simply wrong.

"I hope that the fall of those three invincibles of the Blood Mist Alliance is just an accident, and the Ten Thousand Law Ancestors or other invincibles don't plan to invade the Blood Mist Alliance!"

......

Ye Tian didn't immediately make a move against the Blood Mist Alliance, because the transformation of the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth had not yet ended, and he couldn't leave at this time.

Wait until he has dealt with the affairs of the Holy Land Heaven and Earth, and then go to the Blood Mist Alliance to make a move.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Finally, on this day, the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth were completely transformed, and the rules here were the same as those of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Realm would not be affected in the slightest if they entered here, and there was no obstacle to their cultivation.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to carry out a great migration of the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and Ye Tian even personally moved countless human races to the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

It wasn't until the end of the Great Tribulation of the Sacred Realm that the migration of the human race was over.

At this time, the figure of the Terran appeared in many places in the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and it can be said that the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth became the second largest exotic world of the Terran Race.

At this point, the human race can be regarded as a super-name-level force with two exotic worlds.

"It's time to take action on the Blood Mist Alliance!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Blood Mist Alliance sent three invincibles to attack him this time, but they were killed by him.

He didn't know if there were any invincibles in the Blood Mist Alliance, but if he left it alone, in case it would bring some trouble to the Terrans in the future, it would not be the scene he wanted to see.

Therefore, he was ready to directly erase the power of the Blood Mist Alliance, and with his strength, he could definitely do it.

Soon.

Ye Tian descended on the headquarters of the Blood Mist Alliance, the Blood Mist World.

The Blood Mist Alliance is very powerful, and the number of the strongest people alone has reached thousands, of which there are more than a dozen of the strongest people in the Flesh Tribulation Realm, but these Flesh Tribulation Realm powerhouses almost don't care about trivial matters, and they are dedicated to working hard to impact the invincible.

After all, as soon as the answer to these flesh tribulation realms impacted the invincible realm, the strength of the Blood Mist Alliance would skyrocket, so becoming an invincible was their biggest thing, and everything else was a small thing.

However, Ye Tian descended on the Blood Mist Alliance, and these Flesh Tribulation Realm powerhouses were alarmed.

Wow!

A Flesh Tribulation Realm powerhouse was grabbed by Ye Tian with one hand, and he directly interrogated, "How many invincible people are there in your Blood Mist Alliance?"

This Flesh Tribulation Realm powerhouse didn't dare to hide it, and directly revealed: "This lord, there are a total of four invincibles in our Blood Mist Alliance, and three invincibles fell not long ago, and there is still one Supreme Elder of the Invincible Realm, his name is the Immortal Separation Mist Ancestor. "

"Immortal Fog Ancestor, what kind of strength is he?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Lord Immortal Mist Ancestor seems to be a fifth-rank invincible!" replied the Flesh Tribulation Realm Supreme.

"Got it!"

Ye Tianyi used his strength to directly bombard this flesh robber.

Subsequently, Ye Tian launched a slaughter, and countless powerhouses comparable to the ancestors were annihilated one after another.

They wanted to escape, but no matter how they traveled through time and space, they couldn't escape from the Blood Mist World, but some people were very smart and wanted to escape through one door after another, but Ye Tian destroyed these doors as soon as possible, making their plans fall through.

There are a total of six exotic worlds in the Blood Mist Alliance, and the exotic world where the Immortal Mist Ancestor is located is the Feather Heaven and Earth.

Feathering the world.

A supreme powerhouse came to the Immortal Mist Ancestor and pleaded: "Lord Immortal Misty Ancestor, quickly save the headquarters, an invincible person descended on the Blood Mist Heaven and Earth, and quickly destroyed those gates, we can guard the door, so that we can escape as soon as possible." I beg Lord Immortal Fog Ancestor to support the headquarters and kill the incoming enemy!"

When the Dark Fog Ancestor heard this, he trembled.

He knew that the revenge from the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws had come, and he didn't dare to bet, once he lost the bet, it would be all gone.

And so.

The Immortal Fog Ancestor immediately destroyed the gate between the Feather Heaven and the rest of the Heaven and Earth, and even the Second Order Gate was destroyed, so that the Feather Heaven and Earth would no longer be connected to the other exotic Heaven and Earth.

Even if Ye Tian, the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, destroyed the headquarters of the Blood Mist Alliance, he would not necessarily deliberately look for the Feather Heaven and Earth, maybe he would think that he had escaped, so he would forget it.

He had no choice but to look forward to it.

In fact, he could also choose to escape, Ye Tian really had no way to find him.

However, he was reluctant to leave here and was unwilling to give up this opportunity.

After all, the fifth-class invincible is his limit, but if he doesn't give up this opportunity, he can even reach the fourth-class invincible or even the third-class invincible, and in the future, he is not hopeless to dream of the second-class invincible or even the first-class invincible realm.

Therefore, he will not leave.

As time passed, all the strongest people in the Blood Mist Heaven and Earth, as well as other Fog Ancestors, were killed by him.

As for the endless creatures in the Blood Mist Heaven and Earth, he didn't have time to kill them, it would take too long.

For Ye Tian, killing that Immortal Fog Ancestor was the most important thing.

"This Immortal Fog Ancestor hasn't come to support, so it shouldn't be that he escaped, right?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But a fifth-class invincible person shouldn't be so timid.

After the previous inquiry and investigation, he knew that the Immortal Mist Ancestor was in an exotic world called Feather Heaven and Earth, and that exotic world seemed to be a relatively mysterious exotic world of the Blood Mist Alliance, there were not many people in the Blood Mist Alliance, and those strongest people were usually not allowed to enter and exit casually, and only a few of the strongest were guarded there.

Moreover, those supreme powerhouses of the Blood Mist Alliance did not have the coordinates of feathering heaven and earth.

Ye Tian was about to go to the Feather Heaven and Earth through the doors, but found that those doors had been destroyed.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that something was wrong.

The Mist Ancestor did not appear, but the door was destroyed.

For the invincible, if he wants to escape, it is difficult for him to chase and kill, after all, the invincible travels through the exotic world, and unless there are special means, they cannot be tracked at all.

If the Misty Ancestor wanted to escape, there was no need to destroy the door to the Feather Heaven and Earth.

Unless there is a secret in the Feather Heaven and Earth, and the Immortal Fog Ancestor doesn't want him to know this secret.

"Looks like I'm going to go to Feather Heaven anyway!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
